reasoning_model_1: The model accurately synthesizes the text 'This lecture is so boring, it makes me yawn.' with correct pronunciation and fluency. However, regarding the Core Paralinguistic Compliance, the audio fails to execute the specific instruction to read the sentence 'with a yawn'. reasoning_model_2: The model generates the required text content accurately. Crucially, the transcript 'Yawns... model_comparison: Model 1 failed to incorporate the requested non-linguistic vocalization, delivering a standard reading of the text.
